# Callecto API
> Automated campaign calling and debt collection orchestration API utilizing MongoDB and AI voicebots.

## Entrypoint & Gateway Setup
- [main.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/main.go): Setup Go Fiber app, load env vars, initialize databases, and register Gateway controllers.
- [src/gateways/http.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/src/gateways/http.go): HTTP gateway router mappings.
- [src/gateways/route.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/src/gateways/route.go): API routes configuration and handlers assignment.

## Core Models & Database Entities
- [domain/entities/workspaces.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/workspaces.go): Tenant Workspace schema.
- [domain/entities/debtors.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/debtors.go): Debtor records and pickup analytics stats.
- [domain/entities/call_list_items.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/call_list_items.go): Call scheduling queue entries.
- [domain/entities/call_attempts.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/call_attempts.go): Output logging for dialer attempts.
- [domain/entities/call_sessions.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/call_sessions.go): Calling campaigns and schedule run limits.
- [domain/entities/call_records.go](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/domain/entities/call_records.go): General calls records matches.

## Core Services
- `src/services/call_process.go`: Asynchronous dialer runner routines.
- `src/services/webhook.go`: Webhook processing logic handles call callbacks from Botnoi.

## Interactive Open API Spec
- [openapi.yaml](file:///home/cellul4r/Documents/botnoi/callecto-api/openapi.yaml): Full OpenAPI 3.1 contract specification.
